gxio_mpipe_link_t Struct Reference
[mPIPE Link Management]

An object used to manage mPIPE link state and resources. More...


Data Fields

gxio_mpipe_context_t * context
 The overall mPIPE context.
uint8_t channel
 The channel number used by this link.
uint8_t mac
 The MAC index used by this link.

Detailed Description

An object used to manage mPIPE link state and resources.

Examples:

mpipe/chaining/app.c, mpipe/forward/app.c, mpipe/forward/app_gx8072.c, mpipe/ingress/app.c, mpipe/loopback/app.c, and mpipe/multi_rules/app.c.

Field Documentation

gxio_mpipe_context_t* gxio_mpipe_link_t::context

The overall mPIPE context.

uint8_t gxio_mpipe_link_t::channel

The channel number used by this link.

uint8_t gxio_mpipe_link_t::mac

The MAC index used by this link.

The documentation for this struct was generated from the following file:
  • gxio/mpipe.h
